description_long: This object is a collection of six distinct swords, each with unique blade shapes and handle designs, arranged side by side. The blades vary from straight and double-edged to curved and single-edged, with some featuring broad, cleaver-like profiles and others more slender and pointed. The handles display a range of materials and colors, including wood, metal, and wrapped grips, with some adorned by crossguards or ornate pommels. Several swords have guards of different styles, from simple crossbars to more elaborate, rounded handguards. The color palette includes metallic silvers and grays for the blades, with gold, brown, blue, and black accents on the handles and guards. The overall appearance suggests a mix of historical and fantasy influences, suitable for display or use in a variety of urban or narrative contexts.
description: A set of six visually distinct swords with varied blade shapes and handle designs, featuring metallic blades and colorful, detailed handles and guards.
description_view_0: Six swords are shown side by side, highlighting the full profiles of their blades and the diversity in handle and guard designs.
description_view_1: The swords are viewed edge-on, showing the thinness of the blades and the alignment of the handles, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: The swords are seen from the opposite side, again displaying the full blade profiles and handle details, but in reverse order.
description_view_3: The swords are viewed from the opposite edge, emphasizing the slimness of the blades and the arrangement of the handles in a line.
attribute_blade_type: mixed: straight double-edged, curved single-edged, broad cleaver-like, pointed
attribute_handle_design: varied: straight and contoured, some wrapped, some with pommels, wood and metal materials, some with decorative accents
attribute_ornamentation: some gold accents, colored guards, and decorative pommels; no engravings or inlays
